cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. The question is asking for the possible time window when Thomas was not busy with other activities, and also before the football field closed at 9pm. First, let me list out all the times Thomas was doing other things: 1. Thomas woke up at 8am. (So he was at home, not doing anything else yet?) 2. David saw Thomas fixing their computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. So from 8am to 10am, Thomas was at the electronic store. 3. Jennifer saw Thomas buying lunch at the deli from 10am to 12pm. So from 10am to 12pm, he was at the deli. 4. Lisa saw Thomas walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. So from 12pm to 2pm, he was heading to or at the Statue of Liberty. 5. Sarah saw Thomas buying a phone at the electronics
